---
title: "Neuigkeiten"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    toc: false
    echo: false
    css: styles-mastodon.css
---

```{=html}
<div id="posts-section" style="display:none">
  <p id="post-count" class="post-count"></p>
  <div id="posts-container"></div>
  <div id="load-more-row" style="text-align:center;display:none;padding:1rem 0 2rem">
    <button onclick="loadMore()">Mehr laden</button>
  </div>
</div>

<p id="status-msg" class="status-msg">Wird geladen…</p>
<p id="error-msg" class="error-msg" style="display:none"></p>

<script>
const INSTANCE = 'swiss.social';
const USERNAME  = 'alphorngruppe_rigi_mythen';

let accountId = null;
let maxId     = null;
let totalShown = 0;
let fetching  = false;

function setStatus(msg) {
  const el = document.getElementById('status-msg');
  el.style.display = msg ? 'block' : 'none';
  el.textContent = msg || '';
}
function setError(msg) {
  const el = document.getElementById('error-msg');
  el.style.display = msg ? 'block' : 'none';
  el.textContent = msg || '';
}
function updateCount() {
  document.getElementById('post-count').textContent =
    `${totalShown} Post${totalShown !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
}

async function init() {
  setStatus('Lade Profil…');
  try {
    const res = await fetch(
      `https://${INSTANCE}/api/v1/accounts/lookup?acct=${USERNAME}`
    );
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Profil nicht gefunden (HTTP ${res.status})`);
    const account = await res.json();
    accountId = account.id;
    <!-- renderProfile(account); -->
    setStatus('Lade Posts…');
    await loadMore();
  } catch (e) {
    setStatus('');
    setError('Fehler: ' + e.message);
  }
}

function renderProfile(a) {
  const followersK = a.followers_count >= 1000
    ? (a.followers_count / 1000).toFixed(1) + 'K'
    : a.followers_count.toLocaleString('de-CH');
  const bio = a.note ? a.note.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '') : '';
  document.getElementById('profile-card').innerHTML = `
    <div class="profile-top">
      <img class="avatar" src="${a.avatar}" onerror="this.style.display='none'" alt="">
      <div class="profile-info">
        <h2>${a.display_name || a.username}</h2>
        <div class="handle">@${a.username}@${INSTANCE}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    ${bio ? `<div class="profile-bio">${bio}</div>` : ''}
    <div class="profile-stats">
      <span class="stat"><strong>${a.statuses_count.toLocaleString('de-CH')}</strong> Posts</span>
      <span class="stat"><strong>${followersK}</strong> Follower</span>
      <span class="stat"><strong>${a.following_count.toLocaleString('de-CH')}</strong> Folge ich</span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('profile-card').style.display = 'block';
}

async function loadMore() {
  if (fetching) return;
  fetching = true;
  document.getElementById('load-more-row').style.display = 'none';
  setStatus('Lade Posts…');

  let url = `https://${INSTANCE}/api/v1/accounts/${accountId}/statuses?limit=20`;
  if (maxId) url += `&max_id=${maxId}`;

  try {
    const res = await fetch(url);
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
    const posts = await res.json();

    if (posts.length === 0) {
      setStatus(totalShown === 0 ? 'Keine Posts gefunden.' : '');
      fetching = false;
      return;
    }

    maxId = posts[posts.length - 1].id;
    renderPosts(posts);
    totalShown += posts.length;
    updateCount();
    document.getElementById('posts-section').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('load-more-row').style.display = 'block';
    setStatus('');
  } catch (e) {
    setStatus('');
    setError('Fehler beim Laden: ' + e.message);
  }

  fetching = false;
}

function renderPosts(posts) {
  const container = document.getElementById('posts-container');

  for (const p of posts) {
    const isBoost = !!p.reblog;
    const content = isBoost ? p.reblog : p;
    const date = new Date(content.created_at).toLocaleDateString('de-CH', {
      day: 'numeric', month: 'short', year: 'numeric'
    });
    const media = (content.media_attachments || [])
      .filter(m => m.type === 'image')
      .slice(0, 4);
    const mediaHtml = media.length > 0
      ? `<div class="media-grid">${media.map(m =>
          `<img src="${m.preview_url}" alt="${m.description || ''}">`
        ).join('')}</div>`
      : '';
    const boostHtml = isBoost
      ? `<div class="boost-label">
           <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="13" height="13">
             <path d="M17 1l4 4-4 4"/><path d="M3 11V9a4 4 0 014-4h14"/>
             <path d="M7 23l-4-4 4-4"/><path d="M21 13v2a4 4 0 01-4 4H3"/>
           </svg>
           ${p.account.display_name || p.account.username} hat geteilt
         </div>`
      : '';

    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'post-card';
    div.innerHTML = `
      ${boostHtml}
      <div class="post-header">
        <img class="post-avatar" src="${content.account.avatar}" onerror="this.style.display='none'" alt="">
        <div>
          <div class="post-author">${content.account.display_name || content.account.username}</div>
          <div class="post-date">${date}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="post-body">${content.content}</div>
      ${mediaHtml}
      <div class="post-footer">
        <span class="action">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="14" height="14">
            <path d="M21 15a2 2 0 01-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2z"/>
          </svg>${content.replies_count}
        </span>
        <span class="action">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="14" height="14">
            <path d="M17 1l4 4-4 4"/><path d="M3 11V9a4 4 0 014-4h14"/>
            <path d="M7 23l-4-4 4-4"/><path d="M21 13v2a4 4 0 01-4 4H3"/>
          </svg>${content.reblogs_count}
        </span>
        <span class="action">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="14" height="14">
            <path d="M20.84 4.61a5.5 5.5 0 00-7.78 0L12 5.67l-1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 00-7.78 7.78l1.06 1.06L12 21.23l7.78-7.78 1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 000-7.78z"/>
          </svg>${content.favourites_count}
        </span>
      </div>
    `;
    container.appendChild(div);
  }
}

init();
</script>
```
